claims.summary: History compression must remain Unicode-safe and preserve an eight-exchange production window.
claims.disposition: verify chars().take trimming, relevance-weighted lengths, NEXT sanitization, and the eight-item limit in current source

claims.summary: A nine-character symbol run must be rejected by the dialogue quality gate.
claims.disposition: add the exact reported nine-symbol-run regression

claims.summary: Punctuation-rich reflective prose should not be rejected as degenerate output.
claims.disposition: add a nested-quotation and em-dash acceptance regression

claims.summary: Journal and diversity PromptBlocks must participate in explicit budget overflow handling.
claims.disposition: verify complete PromptBlock assembly and PromptOverflow diagnostics already present in dialogue runtime
